name: Mixtral 8x7B
metaDescription: Mixtral 8x7B (Mistral AI), released 2023-12-09 — part of the Mixtral line. First Mistral MoE; 46.7B total params, Apache 2.0.
overview: Mixtral 8x7B is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mixtral line. Released 2023-12-09. Legacy open-weight sparse mixture-of-experts line that put Mistral on the map.
What's notable in this version: First Mistral MoE; 46.7B total params, Apache 2.0.
